title: Storage Models
description: Storage models for application preferences, secure storage, and sandboxed file storage operations.

PreferenceValueType.description: Data type of a preference value.

value.description: Preference value. The actual JSON type depends on the type field.

type.description: Data type of the preference value.

PreferenceSetRequest.description: Request to set a preference value.

value.description: The value to set for the preference.

type.description: Data type of the value. If null, the type is auto-detected from the JSON value.

sharedName.description: Shared preference container name. If null, uses the default container.

SecureStorageSetRequest.description: Request to set a value in secure (encrypted) storage.

value.description: The string value to store securely.

StorageRoot.description: A logical app storage root advertised by the agent. Absolute device paths are intentionally not exposed.

id.description: Stable root id to pass as the root query parameter. The current shared implementation advertises appData.

kind.description: Portable root kind, such as appData. Future platform roots may use additional kinds.

isWritable.description: Whether files can be uploaded or deleted in this root.

isPersistent.description: Whether data is expected to persist across app restarts.

isBackedUp.description: Whether the platform typically backs up this root.

mayBeClearedBySystem.description: Whether the operating system may purge files in this root.

isUserVisible.description: Whether the root is normally visible to users outside the app.

supportedOperations.description: File operations supported by this root.

StorageRootsResponse.description: Logical file storage roots advertised by the agent. The current shared implementation returns only appData.

FileEntry.description: A file or directory under a storage root.

name.description: Entry name, not including parent directories.

size.description: File size in bytes. Present only for file entries.

lastModified.description: UTC timestamp when the entry was last modified.

FileListResponse.description: Directory listing under a logical storage root. Absolute device paths are never returned.

root.description: Logical storage root id used for the listing.

path.description: Normalized relative directory path. Empty string represents the selected storage root.

root.description: Logical storage root id used for the download.

lastModified.description: UTC timestamp when the file was last modified.

FileUploadRequest.description: Request to upload file content under a storage root.

root.description: Logical storage root id used for the upload.

lastModified.description: UTC timestamp when the file was last modified.

root.description: Logical storage root id used for the delete.
